entries.summary: Phase 2 implementation verified - All 7 tasks aligned with specifications, comprehensive test coverage exists for all error handling scenarios
entries.requirementCoverage: All 7 tasks in Phase 2 are VERIFIED with no drift detected. Implementation aligns with specifications, files have clean syntax and proper imports, comprehensive test coverage exists for all error handling scenarios including JSON parsing fallback, timeout handling, memory checking, and percentage-based progress reporting.
